g.title: cluster_drain
g.text: commit(top_xid, ts, commit_lsn, subxids) — k-way merge

g.title: merge
g.text: per xid: SpillReader → unlink + append in_mem

g.title: detoast
g.text: (pipeline runs this in the decode pool)

g.title: legend
g.text: CH Native rows + DDL via observer
tie: catalog event BEFORE tuple (PG writes pg_class first)
heaps run through detoast post-merge; chunks fold into (relid, value_id)
drain_lsn advances BEFORE on_xact_end ack — cursor surfaces the gap
